(sha=5a409c4453253ceddba4eb72700f50e2d41b451d)
commands.review_summary:
This draft PR adds a bundled channel-broker plugin, a public `openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-broker` protocol, constrained provider capability badges, routing/status tests, docs, labeler/test config, and SecretRef credential coverage for broker-backed chat providers.

PR surface: Source +1942, Tests +1943, Docs +420, Config +77, Generated 0, Other +29. Total +4411 across 53 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug reproduction; for the PR blockers, yes, source inspection reproduces them by comparing the documented inbound/security contract with the implemented channel/runtime code at the PR head.
commands.review_followup: This draft changes public SDK, bundled channel, config, routing, and security semantics, so maintainers need to decide the V1 API/security scope before an automated repair lane should patch it.

target.title: [Feature]: Channel Broker Phase 4 constrained provider capabilities
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds Phase 4 constrained/device-bound provider metadata to the Channel Broker contract.
- Covers WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, and BlueBubbles-backed iMessage bridges as broker provider capabilities, not native plugin rewrites.
- Stacks on Phase 3 official/app capability matrix (#86164), Phase 2D Slack proof (#86157), Phase 2C Discord proof (#86156), Phase 2B Telegram proof (#86154), Phase 2A conformance baseline (#86153), and Phase 1 broker foundation (#86096).

Closes #86114
Related #86105
Related #86108
Supersedes closed PR #86148, which was closed by the repository active-PR cap rather than by an implementation failure.

## What changed

- Adds `constraints` and `badges` to broker platform/provider capabilities.
- Models constrained provider facts such as:
  - `businessApi`, `cloudApi`, `providerHosted`
  - `deviceBound`, `linkedDevice`, `qrPairing`, `sessionFragile`
  - `selfHosted`, `phoneNumberRequired`, `signalCli`
  - `macHostRequired`, `messagesSignedIn`, `privateApiOptional`, `privateApiRequired`
  - `externalBridge`
- Exposes resolved provider capabilities in channel-broker status snapshots so UI/status can show constrained-provider badges.
- Adds WhatsApp, Signal, and iMessage target proof through `channel-broker`.
- Documents constrained provider expectations in Channel Broker, SDK, WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, and BlueBubbles migration docs.

Focused diff for this stack layer:

https://github.com/100yenadmin/openclaw/compare/feat/channel-broker-official-platform-capabilities...feat/channel-broker-constrained-platform-capabilities

## Real Behavior Proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Constrained providers expose hosted, device-bound, self-hosted, Mac-hosted, and bridge-backed limits through broker `constraints`/`badges`, and WhatsApp, Signal, and iMessage still route through provider-owned broker requests.
- **Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw checkout at `/Volumes/LEXAR/repos/openclaw-channel-broker`, using the Channel Broker plugin and SDK from the stacked rollout branch on May 24, 2026.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran a `node --import tsx --input-type=module` terminal proof that evaluated constrained-provider capability support and called `channelBrokerPlugin.message.send.text` for `broker:whatsapp:direct:15551234567`, `broker:signal:direct:+15551234567`, and `broker:imessage:group:chat-guid-1?threadId=imessage-thread-1`.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output excerpt from that local command:

```json
{
  "constrainedProviders": {
    "whatsappBusiness": true,
    "whatsappDeviceBound": false,
    "signalDeviceBound": true
  },
  "outbound": [
    {
      "label": "whatsapp-direct",
      "platform": "whatsapp",
      "conversation": { "id": "15551234567", "type": "direct" }
    },
    {
      "label": "signal-direct",
      "platform": "signal",
      "conversation": { "id": "+15551234567", "type": "direct" }
    },
    {
      "label": "imessage-group",
      "platform": "imessage",
      "conversation": {
        "id": "chat-guid-1",
        "type": "group",
        "threadId": "imessage-thread-1"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The live SDK/plugin path distinguished WhatsApp Business-style support from device-bound WhatsApp requirements, accepted Signal's self-hosted/device-bound constraint set, and produced broker provider requests for WhatsApp, Signal, and iMessage.
- **What was not tested:** Live WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, or BlueBubbles-backed provider traffic; this PR proves the broker contract/schema/docs layer and leaves broad validation to GitHub Actions.

## Validation

Run locally from `/Volumes/LEXAR/repos/openclaw-channel-broker`:

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=/Volumes/LEXAR/Codex/channel-broker-vitest-include.json pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-fast.config.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/channel-broker/src/channel.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/conformance.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/config-schema.test.ts --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-channel-broker.config.ts`
- `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p extensions/channel-broker/tsconfig.json`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/plugin-sdk/channel-broker.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-broker.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/accounts.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/config-schema.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/config-schema.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/platforms.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/target.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/channel.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/channel.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/conformance.test.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/status.ts extensions/channel-broker/src/types.ts docs/channels/channel-broker.md docs/plugins/sdk-channel-broker.md docs/channels/whatsapp.md docs/channels/signal.md docs/channels/imessage.md docs/channels/imessage-from-bluebubbles.md`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/channel-broker --format unix`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/channels/channel-broker.md docs/plugins/sdk-channel-broker.md docs/channels/whatsapp.md docs/channels/signal.md docs/channels/imessage.md docs/channels/imessage-from-bluebubbles.md`
- `pnpm dlx --config.resolution-mode=highest markdownlint-cli2 --config config/markdownlint-cli2.jsonc docs/channels/channel-broker.md docs/plugins/sdk-channel-broker.md docs/channels/whatsapp.md docs/channels/signal.md docs/channels/imessage.md docs/channels/imessage-from-bluebubbles.md`

## Review state

- Draft until the stacked Channel Broker PR chain clears review.
- Waiting on ClawSweeper/final maintainer review across the stack.
- This PR does not implement Phase 5 legacy-plugin freeze.
target.author: 100yenadmin
